name: Ocular Entrapment
description: Notes The Lingering Eyebawl has the following sprite(s):
effects: Eyebawl Toss: Summon a lingering eyebawl that lasts for 10 seconds Upon repeated throws targeting an Eyebawl, it deals 1200 damage within 6 sqrs Eyebawl Damage Cooldown: 0.8 seconds Eyebawl Toss Cooldown: 2 seconds On enemies: Inflicts Slowed for 3 seconds
